bio.en: Responsible for overall team coordination, management, and match strategy planning.
bio.zh: 負責團隊管理和策略規劃

bio.en: Responsible for autonomous algorithms, sensor integration, and driver-controlled software.
bio.zh: 負責機器人自動和遙控程式開發

bio.en: Responsible for robot chassis assembly, sub-systems mechanical prototyping, and fabrication.
bio.zh: 負責機器人機構設計和製作

bio.en: Responsible for community outreach, STEM advocacy, social media management, and sponsor relations.
bio.zh: 負責團隊對外推廣和社群經營

bio.en: Responsible for 3D modeling, mechanical fit testing, and blueprints generation using CAD software.
bio.zh: 負責機器人 3D 建模和設計

bio.en: Responsible for operating the robot during driver-controlled matches and coordinating on-field tactics.
bio.zh: 負責遙控操作和賽場策略
